description.s: The viewport's view - renders the navigation chrome around the current root item. This is the top-level container that frames all user interaction with Hobson.
: Updates browser tab title to show current item name
: Tracks selected item for context menu operations
: Right-click menu for View As, Add Child, Delete, Copy ID, etc.
The viewport manages the full view resolution hierarchy:
Contextual override (stored in parent's child spec or viewport's root view)
attributes and tooltips to rendered items for:

v.s:
No item selected.

Cmd+K - Search items
Ctrl+\ - Open REPL
Right-click - Context menu

m.s: position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; padding-top: 10vh; z-index: 10000000;

background: var(--color-bg-surface); border-radius: 8px; width: 600px; min-width: 600px; max-width: 90vw; max-height: 70vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); overflow: auto;

content.code:
(defn render [item api] (def doc (dom-get (hiccup->dom [:div]) :ownerDocument)) (def win (dom-get doc :defaultView)) (def search-str (or (dom-get (dom-get win :location) :search) "")) (def url-root (when (str/includes? search-str "root=") (let [ pairs (str/split (subs search-str 1) "&") root-pair (first (filter (fn [p] (str/includes? p "root=")) pairs))] (when root-pair (let [parts (str/split root-pair "=")] (when (> (count parts) 1) (nth parts 1))))))) (def stored-spec (first (:attachments item))) (def stored-root-id (if (string? stored-spec) stored-spec (:id stored-spec))) (def resolved (if (and url-root (not= url-root stored-root-id)) (try (do (get-item url-root) (invoke api "set" (merge item {:attachments [{:id url-root}] :modified (now)}) {:silent true}) {:root-id url-root :root-spec {:id url-root}}) (catch _ (do (log/warn "[viewport-view] URL root not found:" url-root) {:root-id stored-root-id :root-spec stored-spec}))) {:root-id stored-root-id :root-spec stored-spec})) (def root-id (:root-id resolved)) (def root-spec (:root-spec resolved)) (def root-view-id (or (get-in root-spec [:view :type]) (:view root-spec) (:renderer root-spec))) (if root-id (let [ root-item (get-item root-id :select (fn [it] [(:name it) (get-in it [:content :title])])) iname (or (get-in root-item [:content :title]) (:name root-item) (subs root-id 0 8))] (dom-set! doc :title (str iname " - Hobson"))) (dom-set! doc :title "Hobson")) (def context-menu (hiccup->dom [:div#context-menu.context-menu {:style "display:none;"}])) (invoke (dom-get doc :body) "appendChild" context-menu) (defn hide-context-menu [] (dom-set! (dom-get context-menu :style) :display "none") (dom-set! context-menu :innerHTML "")) (defn show-empty-context-menu [x y] (dom-set! context-menu :innerHTML "") (let [menu-lib (require "context-menu-lib")] (invoke context-menu "appendChild" (invoke menu-lib "buildEmptyMenu" api {:onDismiss hide-context-menu})) (let [ inner-w (dom-get win :innerWidth) inner-h (dom-get win :innerHeight) menu-x (if (> (+ x 180) inner-w) (- inner-w 190) x) menu-y (if (> (+ y 100) inner-h) (- inner-h 110) y)] (dom-set! (dom-get context-menu :style) :left (str menu-x "px")) (dom-set! (dom-get context-menu :style) :top (str menu-y "px")) (dom-set! (dom-get context-menu :style) :display "block")))) (on-cleanup! (fn [] (invoke context-menu "remove"))) (if (not root-id) (let [ [container crefs] (hiccup->dom+ [ :div.viewport-container {:style "display:flex; flex-direction:column; height:100%; position:relative;"} [ :div {:ref :empty :style "padding:40px; text-align:center; color:var(--color-text-secondary); flex:1;"}]]) empty-el (:empty crefs) _ (dom-set! empty-el :innerHTML "No item selected.

color:var(--color-text-secondary); font-style:italic; text-align:center;"} (or (:name item) (subs (:id item) 0 8))])))) [container crefs] (hiccup->dom+ [ :div.viewport-container { :ref :container :tabindex "0" :style "display:flex; flex-direction:column; height:100%; position:relative;"} [ :div { :ref :content :class "viewport-content" :data-item-id root-id :style "flex:1; overflow:auto; display:flex; flex-direction:column; min-height:0;"} [ :render-child { :item root-id :view root-view-id :decorator item-decorator :on-cycle root-on-cycle :style "flex:1; min-height:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column;"}]]]) content-area (:content crefs) overlay-specs (rest (:attachments item)) _ (for [spec overlay-specs] (let [ oid (if (string? spec) spec (:id spec)) [wrapper wrefs] (hiccup->dom+ [ :div { :ref :overlay :style "position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; padding-top: 10vh; z-index: 10000000;"} [ :div { :ref :modal :style "background: var(--color-bg-surface); border-radius: 8px; width: 600px; min-width: 600px; max-width: 90vw; max-height: 70vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); overflow: auto;"}]]) overlay-el (:overlay wrefs) modal-el (:modal wrefs) close-overlay (fn [] (detach! selected-item-id (or iid nil)) (reset! selected-parent-id (or pid nil)) (reset! selected-element (when iid (invoke container "querySelector" (str "[data-item-id=\"" iid "\"]")))) (update-selection-visual))))) show-context-menu (fn [x y iid] (let [menu-item (get-item iid)] (dom-set! context-menu :innerHTML "") (reset! last-ctx-coords {:x x :y y}) (let [ menu-lib (require "context-menu-lib") get-click-coords (fn [] (when (deref selected-parent-id) (let [ sel (str "[data-parent-id=\"" (deref selected-parent-id) "\"]") canvas-child (invoke doc "querySelector" sel) canvas (when canvas-child (dom-get canvas-child :parentElement))] (when canvas (let [rect (invoke canvas "getBoundingClientRect") coords (deref last-ctx-coords)] { :x (+ (- (:x coords) (dom-get rect :left)) (dom-get canvas :scrollLeft)) :y (+ (- (:y coords) (dom-get rect :top)) (dom-get canvas :scrollTop))}))))) dismiss-opts {:onDismiss hide-context-menu} parent-opts (merge dismiss-opts {:parentId (deref selected-parent-id)})] (invoke context-menu "appendChild" (invoke menu-lib "buildAddChildSubmenu" api iid (merge dismiss-opts {:getClickCoords get-click-coords}))) (invoke context-menu "appendChild" (dom-get context-menu :style) :display "block") (if (> (+ menu-x 340) inner-w) (invoke (dom-get context-menu :classList) "add" "submenu-left") (invoke (dom-get context-menu :classList) "remove" "submenu-left")))))) find-item-element (fn [target] (or (invoke target "closest" "[data-parent-id][data-item-id]") (invoke target "closest" "[data-item-id]"))) _ (dom-on! container :click (fn [e] (hide-context-menu) (let [el (find-item-element (dom-get e :target))] (if el (do (select-item (invoke el "getAttribute" "data-item-id") el) (stop-propagation! e)) (clear-selection))))) _ (dom-on! container :contextmenu (fn [e] (when (not (dom-get e :shiftKey)) (prevent-default! e) (let [el (find-item-element (dom-get e :target))] (if el (let [iid (invoke el "getAttribute" "data-item-id")] (select-item iid el) (show-context-menu (dom-get e :clientX) (dom-get e :clientY) iid)) (do (clear-selection) (show-empty-context-menu (dom-get e :clientX) (dom-get e :clientY)))))))) _ (dom-on! container :keydown (fn [e] (when (= (dom-get e :key) "Escape") (if (not= (dom-get (dom-get context-menu :style) :display) "none") (hide-context-menu) (clear-selection))))) _ (on-document! :keydown (fn [e] (when (and (or (dom-get e :metaKey) (dom-get e :ctrlKey)) (= (dom-get e :key) "k")) (prevent-default! e) (invoke api "showItemList"))))] container)))
